ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( CONTAINS( RecordType.Name , 'Weekly Report' ) , NOT ( AND( IF( ISBLANK( TEXT( FirstDayOfCreateWeeklyReport__c ) ), true, VALUE( TEXT( FirstDayOfWeeklyReport__c ) ) <= VALUE( TEXT( FirstDayOfCreateWeeklyReport__c ) ) ), IF( ISBLANK (TEXT( FirstDayOfReminderWeeklyReport__c ) ) , true, VALUE( TEXT( FirstDayOfWeeklyReport__c ) ) <= VALUE( TEXT( FirstDayOfReminderWeeklyReport__c ) ) ) ) ), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The start date must be lower or equal to the creation/reminder date!
